chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Transfer Application No.80 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hg. of main case 13.10.2025 Mr. Azhar Hussain, advocate for applicant Mr. Zahoor Ahmed, APG ----- By consent this application is allowed on the ground that trial Court is lying vacant. Special Crl. Case No.1-A/2023 is hereby withdrawn from the Court of 2nd Anti-Terrorism Court, Karachi and transferred to the Court of learned 05th Anti-Terrorism Court, Karachi, for disposal according to law. This Cr. Transfer Application is disposed of. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
